prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UNV-LFKPSCFHGO-BUN-2PK-STD-PZ-AMZ-FBA Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 2-PACK Ultra Light Foam Kneeling Pad and Seat Cushion for Home Garden Outdoor Description: Large Foam Kneeling Pad is great for Gardening, Cleaning, Outdoor Activities and More.

Made with soft and durable EVA material these pads are lightweight and convenient for carrying and storage.

Perfect for protecting your knees and can even be used as a seat cushion especially for bleachers and sporting events. Search Terms: knee pad foam cushion outdoor activities gardening gardening tools landscaping yard work Features: - Foam Kneeling Pad Dimensions: 16" x 8" x 0.75 inches - Soft Lightweight and Durable EVA Material - Cut Out Handle For Convenient Carrying and Storage - Used to Protect Your Knees and Can Also be Used as a Seat Cushion - Great for Gardening, Cleaning, Outdoor Activities, etc. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 2-Pack Foam Kneeling Pad and Seat Cushion

tokens.name: Foam Kneeling Pad and Seat Cushion

tokens.name: Foam Kneeling Pad And Seat Cushion

anthropic.title_differentiation: Lightweight EVA Material, 16 X 8 Inches, Carrying Handle, Knee Protection, Gardening And Outdoor Activities

openai.title_differentiation: 16" X 8" X 075" Eva Foam, Lightweight With Carry Handle, Protects Knees, Great For Gardening And Cleaning
